name: python3-jaraco.text
title: python3-jaraco.text
description:
jaraco text manipulation functions
Text manipulation functions and classes, mostly needed as a dependency
of other projects involving the same upstream developer, including
cherrypy.

When validating lab setup, run `python3-jaraco.text --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
